commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content:
Save (salvat.) Many ancient manuscripts read salvet, conformably to the Hebrew and Septuagint, as if the king cursed the woman: "Let not the Lord save thee "Josephus ix. 4. Others place the stops differently: "He said, no: the Lord save thee. "(Calmet)
He is the author of life. (Menochius)
